mapper.select: SELECT cr.room_id FROM chat_room cr WHERE cr.room_type = 'DIRECT' AND cr.room_id IN (SELECT room_id FROM chat_room_user WHERE member_id = #{userA}) AND cr.room_id IN (SELECT room_id FROM chat_room_user WHERE member_id = #{userB})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER_BLOCK WHERE (member_id = #{userA} AND blocked_id = #{userB}) OR (member_id = #{userB} AND blocked_id = #{userA})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM CHAT_ROOM_USER WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT_ROOM_USER WHERE room_id = #{roomId}

SELECT cr.room_id AS "room_id", cr.room_type AS "room_type",
CASE WHEN cr.room_type = 'DIRECT' THEN ( SELECT m.nickname FROM chat_room_user cru2 JOIN member m ON cru2.member_id = m.member_id WHERE cru2.room_id = cr.room_id AND cru2.member_id != #{userId} )
WHEN cr.room_type = 'FESTIVAL' THEN fi.title
ELSE cr.room_title END AS "room_title",
CASE WHEN cr.room_type = 'DIRECT' THEN ( SELECT m.profile_image_url FROM chat_room_user cru2 JOIN member m ON cru2.member_id = m.member_id WHERE cru2.room_id = cr.room_id AND cru2.member_id != #{userId} )
WHEN cr.room_type = 'FESTIVAL' THEN fi.first_image
ELSE cr.room_image END AS "room_image",
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_user cru3 WHERE cru3.room_id = cr.room_id ) AS "current_count",
cr.max_capacity AS "max_capacity",
cru.joined_at AS "joined_at", cru.last_read_at AS "last_read_at"
FROM chat_room cr
JOIN chat_room_user cru ON cr.room_id = cru.room_id
LEFT JOIN festival_info fi ON cr.festival_id = fi.content_id
WHERE cru.member_id = #{userId}
ORDER BY cr.room_id DESC
